meta.ab_rule: A and B are always different types — if A is freelance, B is academic or skill, never the same category

b.task: Coffee + write down your 3 goals for today before opening any app

b.task: Read 2 academic papers and write a short summary for each

evaluation.question: Did I complete at least 1 freelance task today?
Did I study or do something academic today?
Did I spend at least 30 min on my skill course?
Did I cook at least one proper meal?
Did I avoid getting stuck in only one type of work all day?
Did I spend time at the library or a focused study space?
What did I procrastinate on — and why?
What will I do differently tomorrow?

anti_spiral_rules.action: Stop → do 30 min academic or skill
Don't double it tomorrow — just move on
